new_axes.label: Societal Values and Expectations in Relationships
new_axes.left_pole: Emphasis on individual autonomy, personal fulfillment, and evolving gender roles in relationships.
new_axes.right_pole: Adherence to traditional gender roles, predefined checklists for partners, and expectations of material/familial support.

new_axes.label: Value of Traditional vs. Modern Literacy Approaches
new_axes.left_pole: Emphasis on extensive reading, exposure to diverse vocabulary and language patterns as key to literacy development.
new_axes.right_pole: Reliance on structured worksheets, standardized methods, or concerns about the perceived decline in reading habits.
